untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of earnings announcements with surprise magnitude (actual vs consensus deviation > 5%), which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The 'returns' indicator is used as a proxy for price move but cannot capture earnings-specific surprise data. This requires external data source (earnings calendar with consensus estimates) not supported by price/volume/technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: Translated available components: (1) Earnings surprise proxied using returns > 5% on announcement day; (2) Price closes above open with minimum 1.5% daily gain expressed as returns > 0.05 AND close > open; (3) Volume > 150% of 30-day average expressed as vol_ratio_20 > 1.5; (4) Close above previous day's high using close > prev_high; (5) Stop loss at 8% below entry; (6) Exit at 30 calendar days. Core limitation: earnings surprise confirmation cannot be fully replicated without earnings data feeds.
